# Contributing

There are two things worth contributing here: fixing data and sharing ideas.

## Fix a data error

Star counts, descriptions, and links come straight from GitHub Trending at the time each report is generated. If something's wrong, open a [data correction issue](../issues/new?template=data-correction.md) with the date, the field, and what it should say.

A source link helps — a screenshot of GitHub from that day is even better.

## Share an idea

Visual style ideas, feature suggestions, thoughts on the format — all welcome. Open a [Discussion](../discussions) rather than an Issue. No formal template needed, just say what's on your mind.

## One rule

Be specific. "The description for X on Y is wrong, here's the correct value" is a great issue. "Some things look off" is not.
